user.title: Set up BToddB Room Climate Controller
user.description: This creates the BToddB Room Climate Controller hub. After setup, add your rooms from the integration's “Add room” option.

abort.single_instance_allowed: BToddB Room Climate Controller is already configured. Add rooms from the existing entry.

user.title: Room basics
user.description: Name the room and choose which kinds of climate devices it has.

data.label: Room name
data.room_key: Room key (optional, auto-derived from the name)
data.combined: Cooling and heating are the same unit (heat pump)

reconfigure.title: Room basics
reconfigure.description: Update the room name and its capabilities.

data.label: Room name
data.combined: Cooling and heating are the same unit (heat pump)

devices.title: Devices
devices.description: Pick the entities Room Climate should command for this room. Leave any blank if not applicable.

sensors.title: Sensors, limits & timing
sensors.description: Choose the room's sensors and the temperature limits/timing the controller should use.

data.window_sensors: Window sensors (optional, suppresses heating/cooling while any is open)

error.key_exists: Another room already uses this key.

apply_profile.name: Apply profile
apply_profile.description: Apply a daily climate profile's presets to its room now.

profile_id.name: Profile
profile_id.description: The id of the profile to apply.

set_manual_mode.name: Set manual mode
set_manual_mode.description: Turn a room's manual mode (automation kill switch) on or off.
